title: Practice Follow-Up
teacherAction: Assign one short remedial set based on the weakest repeated topic.

title: Mock Review
teacherAction: Use the latest mock score to decide whether to revise concepts or increase timed sets.

title: Repeated Mistake Check
teacherAction: Start next class by correcting one saved mistake pattern.

title: Revision Queue Follow-Up
teacherAction: Ask the student to explain one reviewed queue item without looking.

title: Route Task Completion
teacherAction: Check whether daily route tasks are being completed before assigning more work.

title: Student Notes Review
teacherAction: Review saved notes to identify repeated misconceptions.
